# Fail2Ban

## How to see IP blocked ?

```bash
# fail2ban-client status asterisk
Status for the jail: asterisk
|- Filter
|  |- Currently failed: 0
|  |- Total failed:     0
|  `- File list:        /var/log/asterisk/full
`- Actions
   |- Currently banned: 37
   |- Total banned:     37
   `- Banned IP list:   107.189.18.136 147.124.221.81 15.204.144.239 15.204.149.75 163.5.241.7 172.110.223.11 172.110.223.22 172.110.223.33 172.110.223.43 172.110.223.51 172.110.223.55 172.110.223.61 173.239.216.40 173.245.76.90 185.210.157.162 185.210.157.66 185.243.5.186 185.243.5.46 193.46.255.113 194.164.96.83 194.50.16.131 195.154.200.243 198.143.149.250 216.126.224.112 37.140.254.90 43.225.196.98 5.39.101.60 51.38.211.50 64.95.96.68 64.95.96.70 77.83.240.228 85.155.225.12 89.35.28.12 91.208.92.163 93.105.246.57 96.44.159.197 96.44.174.22
```
